plan_options.label: Plan to forage hard tomorrow
plan_options.summary: Prioritise the scrapyard at open — bias toward a richer haul.

plan_options.label: Plan a restoration day
plan_options.summary: Focus the bench: clean and judge what's already in storage.

plan_options.label: Plan a market day
plan_options.summary: Work the phone — list, haggle, and dispose of restored pieces.

plan_options.label: Just rest
plan_options.summary: No special preparation; take the day as it comes.
